titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Richard Nash Gould Collection of Photographs Documenting Yale University
Gould (Richard Nash) Collection of Photographs Documenting Yale University
titlestmt.author: compiled by Matthew Gorham and Sheilah Robinson and staff of Manuscripts and Archives

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 08:34

did.unittitle: Richard Nash Gould collection of photographs documenting Yale University
did.abstract: This collection consists of photographic prints and digital images of Yale and New Haven buildings and locales, Yale football games, and other events.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This collection consists of photographic prints and digital images of Yale and New Haven buildings and locales, Yale football games, and other events.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Gift of Richard Nash Gould, 2013 and 2015.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Richard Nash Gould Collection of Photographs Documenting Yale University (RU 1127). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright is retained by the creator(s) of this collection for unpublished works they have authored or otherwise produced. After the lifetime of the creator(s) or until January 15, 2040, whichever comes first, copyright passes to Yale University. Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 48-A (YRG 48-A), Yale pictorial records and collections.

did.unittitle: Friends of Yale gathering on Nantucket
Levin, Richard, final speech at Woolsey Hall as President of Yale
Whiffenpoofs, performance at the Class of 1968 45th reunion

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Original born digital files, as well as preservation masters, may not be accessed due to their fragility. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist request that they be made. Born digital files cannot be accessed remotely. System requirements include a Manuscripts and Archives computer and file viewing software.

did.unittitle: College and Chapel Streets, New Haven
Friends of Yale gathering on Nantucket
Levin, Richard, final speech at Woolsey Hall as President of Yale
Whiffenpoofs, performance at the Class of 1968 45th reunion
Whiffenpoofs, rehearsal at the Class of 1968 45th reunion
Yale Club of New York City tap room
Yale Global Alumni Leadership Exchange (YaleGALE) event in Edinburgh, Scotland (6 photographs)
